name: Jushi Holdings Inc.
business: Jushi Holdings Inc. is a vertically integrated multi-state cannabis operator engaged in retail, distribution, cultivation, and processing operations in both medical and adult-use markets. The company sells a variety of cannabis products including flower, vaporization devices, extracts, edibles, and pre-rolls under in-house brands and third-party products. Products are sold through company-operated dispensaries under brands like Beyond Hello, Nature's Remedy, and NuLeaf, as well as wholesale to duly-licensed third parties.

exposures.sentence: We offer both in-house brands and third-party products at each of our retail locations in states where we are vertically integrated.
Our business involves the growing of cannabis, an agricultural product.

catalysts.sentence: If signed into law, adult-use sales are expected to commence on January 1, 2027.
